title: AXS mechanism preregistration v2 draft — entry-point ablation
bindingNote: DESIGN DRAFT — not a registered preregistration. The evidence gate must refuse any prereg whose status is not 'registered'. Committed only to hash-pin the design and liveness criteria.
changeJustification: v1 terminated at design stage with zero evaluation-family evidence.

Pilot on non-evaluation families: of 63 variant episodes (alpha 0/5, freeze_at_1 across 3 families x 7 probes), 60 were trace-identical to the alpha=1 default; the 3 discordant episodes share a single probe slot in family 777 — the preregistered exploration-pressure contrast is behaviorally degenerate.

Because freeze_at_1 also freezes post-round-1 theta/A updates while preserving live context features, post-round-1 learned-weight updates were also behaviorally inert UNDER LIVE-CONTEXT PILOT CONDITIONS and may re-emerge when E1/E4 are cut.
v2 reframes the program as entry-point ablation over E1 (context-to-feature), E2/E3 (A/b accumulation), E4 (tie-break seed); evaluation families remain untouched.

scope.policyFamilies: AXS UCB entry-ablation variants (new IDs; C-011 frozen set untouched)

tieBreakCaveatMarker: subject to a tie-breaking sensitivity caveat (AXS-010 soft_pass)

yokedSchedule.v2Note: not used by v2 experiments; retained for schema continuity

traceFreeTieBreakSpec.roundIndexRequiredNote: without roundIndex the tie-break repeats across rounds and collapses utility
traceFreeTieBreakSpec.featureLexicographicNote: feature_lexicographic is NOT trace-free while context is live (E4-via-E1)

armConfigs.a4_alphaNonFunctionalNote: in never_learn the bonus reduces to a positive scalar multiple of ||x|| under A=lambda*I, so alpha is not an exploration manipulation

primaryContrast.name: delta_e1
primaryContrast.acceptance: sign positive in >=4/5 families AND cross_family_seeded_bootstrap ciLower > 0

e4Equivalence.name: delta_e4
e4Equivalence.rule: bootstrap CI of delta_e4 contained in (-delta, +delta)
e4Equivalence.marginDerivation: delta = max(2*SD_critic(delta_e4 per-family), 0.25*abs(mean_critic(delta_e1))); fixed numerically in the registered v2 after the critic liveness pilot

sanity.rule: per-family excess <= epsilon OR all-probe identical-signature flag

imprint.directionalPrediction: separability maintained or increased relative to a2 (one-round context imprint)

branches.name: strong_e1
branches.condition: delta_e1 pass AND delta_e4 null AND a2 utility >= RANDOM
branches.licensedClaim: E1 (context-to-feature) mediates AXS UCB separability within the tested policy families in this controlled testbed

branches.name: weak_joint_utility
branches.condition: delta_e1 pass AND delta_e4 null AND a2 degenerate
branches.licensedClaim: E1 mediates separability but ctx-free arm utility is degenerate; E1 separability effect is conditional on non-degenerate utility within the tested policy families in this controlled testbed

branches.name: e1_e4_joint
branches.condition: delta_e1 pass AND delta_e4 not null
branches.licensedClaim: E1/E4 jointly mediate separability within the tested policy families in this controlled testbed; E1-only attribution is forbidden

branches.name: e2e3_reemergence
branches.condition: delta_e1 fail with residual a2 separability AND a5 sanity pass
branches.licensedClaim: M1-level re-emergence report: E2/E3 accumulation may re-emerge when context is cut; no mechanism claim above M1

branches.name: no_claim_m1_only
branches.condition: cross-family inconsistency (positive sign in <=3/5 families) or other unmet
branches.licensedClaim: no claim at any rung above M1 within the tested policy families in this controlled testbed

branches.name: sanity_fail
branches.licensedClaim: gate fail — all claims blocked; all-entry-cut arm exceeds epsilon, indicating a confound in the ablation design

AXS-ENTRY-001.a3MisuseNote: citing a3 (imprint) as the kill arm fails the gate

AXS-ENTRY-010.target: delta_e1 conclusion invariance over tie-break scheme

decision.strict_pass: sign and trackDecision unchanged AND variant estimates within baseline 95% CI

M3.requires: M2 + AXS-001 full alpha sweep + anchor validation

pairs.rule: >=50% of probe episodes distinct traceHash on >=3/4 critic families
>=50% of probe episodes distinct traceHash on >=3/4 critic families
>=50% of probe episodes distinct traceHash on >=3/4 critic families
>=50% of probe episodes distinct traceHash on >=3/4 critic families

livenessCriteria.a5Rule: interpretability: identical-signature flag or abs(excess) <= provisional epsilon; AND distinct from a1
